summary: Verified P0 bug fix: Discogs album artwork now appears correctly in ISO search modal and throughout the Honeypot page. The fix involved: 1) Added `priority` prop to AlbumArt in RecordSearchResult.js for eager loading, 2) Fixed shimmer timeout bug in AlbumArt.js that was removing img tag after 8s. All tested features pass.

backend_api_discogs_search.details: GET /api/discogs/search?q=radiohead%20ok%20computer returns 20 results, all with valid cover_url fields pointing to i.discogs.com

iso_search_modal_album_art.details: Search results in ISO modal display album artwork instantly. 10 images found in dropdown, all rendered=True with proper dimensions (600x591, 600x600, etc.)

listing_search_modal_album_art.details: Search results in List a Record modal display album artwork. 10 images found, all rendered=True with proper dimensions

selected_release_preview_album_art.details: After selecting a Discogs result, the preview shows album artwork correctly (e.g., OK Computer by Radiohead shows cover image)

community_hunt_cards_album_art.details: Community ISO cards display album artwork. 5+ images tested, all rendered=True. Cards show: Harmony Of Spheres, My Everything, Everything To Everyone (Deluxe), Mayhem, Speak Now

listing_cards_album_art.details: Shop/listing cards display album artwork correctly. Images rendered from uploaded files (honeygroove/uploads/)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Discogs album artwork bug is FIXED. Key changes: 1) RecordSearchResult.js line 23 - added `priority` prop to AlbumArt for eager loading, 2) AlbumArt.js lines 157-205 - fixed shimmer timeout that was incorrectly removing the img tag after 8s. Images now load instantly in search modals and persist correctly.
